mission.title: istio: validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision
mission.description: validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision. Requested by 13+ users.

steps.title: Check current istio deployment
steps.description:
Verify your istio version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
helm list -n istio-system 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working istio installation.

steps.title: Review istio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant istio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio
```
**Bug description**
validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision.

steps.title: Apply the fix for validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision
steps.description:
To fix https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/27501

Before
```
[istio-1.7.2]$ ./bin/istioctl install --set revision=1-7-2
✔ Istio core installed                                                                                                               
✔ Istiod installed                         
```yaml
info	validationController	Reconcile(enter): retry dry-run creation of invalid config
info	validationController	Not ready to switch validation to fail-closed: dummy invalid config not rejected
info	validationController	validatingwebhookconfiguration istiod-istio-system (failurePolicy=Ignore, resourceVersion=6800611) is up-to-date. No change required.
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
To fix https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/27501

Before
```
[istio-1.7.2]$ ./bin/istioctl install --set revision=1-7-2
✔ Istio core installed                                                                                                               
✔ Istiod installed                                                                                                                   
✔ Ingress
codeSnippets:
info	validationController	Reconcile(enter): retry dry-run creation of invalid config
info	validationController	Not ready to switch validation to fail-closed: dummy invalid config not rejected
info	validationController	validatingwebhookconfiguration istiod-istio-system (failurePolicy=Ignore, resourceVersion=6800611) is up-to-date. No change required.

service:
      name: istiod-1-7-2
      namespace: istio-system
      path: /validate
      port: 443

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
